name: confidential-fhevm-skill
description: AI agent skill (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf) for building, testing, and deploying confidential smart contracts on FHEVM. Covers both the Foundry track (forge-fhevm + @zama-fhe/sdk v3, current canonical) and the Hardhat track (@fhevm/hardhat-plugin + SDK v2, for existing projects). Ships SKILL.md, fifteen reference docs, four worked examples, three template suites (Hardhat, Foundry, SDK v3), and an executable static linter with twenty anti-pattern rules across Solidity AST and frontend regex.
author: harystyleseze
